text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, December 14. No work meetings today. You have gardening in the front walkway and a quiet dinner with the family.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Personal time is valuable. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good planning. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Hosted a game night at our place. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've noted the plans. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Doing some cleaning around the house. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Good call on checking that. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan's team played a match and won 4-3! Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've got the schedule covered. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Prepping school lunches for the week. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Healthy choices are great. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Listening to a podcast in the garage. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. I've adjusted the local settings. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Screen time is always a negotiation. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Planning a street block party soon. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! I've noted the plans. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, The lawn mower is having issues starting. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Automations are great when they work. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan's team played a match and won 4-3! Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Great progress. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that prepping school lunches for the week. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Meal planning saves so much time. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Good weekend progress on home projects. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
